title: Purchaser
description:
• Location: Changi North
  • Company Transport
  • Competitive Salary
  • Performance bonus
  • Progressive performance Increment
  • Annual leave
  • 5 days work

Dynamic Team to work with positive and comfortable working environment

Job Summary

Drive procurement operations by leading tactical and strategic purchasing activities to ensure timely delivery of materials, support manufacturing needs, and optimize supplier relationships within a manufacturing environment.

Responsibilities

  • Lead sourcing, negotiating, placing orders, and following up on deliveries to secure materials that meet production requirements
  • Manage vendor relationships with local and overseas suppliers to ensure quality and reliability
  • Implement and oversee on-time delivery programs, expediting material shipments to support uninterrupted plant operations
  • Investigate and resolve supplier shipment discrepancies to maintain supply chain integrity
  • Update and maintain daily and monthly planning and purchasing reports to track procurement performance
  • Conduct weekly follow-ups with suppliers on forecasted requirements to align supply with production demand
  • Generate purchase orders, expedite orders, reschedule deliveries, and manage excess inventory to optimize stock levels
  • Collaborate with internal teams to support Request for Quotation (RFQ) processes and procurement on behalf of the company when necessary
  • Ensure timely delivery of materials to support manufacturing operations and production schedules
  • Manage Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) processes to handle defective or excess materials efficiently
  • Perform related ad hoc duties to support the Purchasing Department’s objectives and continuous improvement initiatives

Required competencies and certifications

  • Diploma or relevant certification in a related field
  • Minimum 2 years of experience in manufacturing or contract manufacturing procurement
  • Proficient in Excel and ERP systems, specifically Epicor, to manage procurement data and processes
  • Knowledge of procurement and supply chain principles to execute purchasing strategies effectively
  • Strong communication and negotiation skills to manage supplier relationships and internal stakeholders
  • Self-motivated and highly responsible with the ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines
  • Knowledge of raw materials and Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) processes essential for procurement decisions

Immediate Starter

Please submit your updated resume in MS Word format by using the APPLY NOW BUTTON.

You may also email your resume directly to hr@shamrock.com.sg

**We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates would be notified.

** We wish you all the best in your career search.

Thanks

Warmest Regards

Shamrock Pte. Ltd.

hr@shamrock.com.sg Whatsapp : 9630 2466

Office : 6817 7477 Reg No : R2091083 License : 20C0060

postedCompany.description:
Shamrock Human Resources provide consulting services and solutions in recruitment for employers who need great people so are job seekers reaching up to opportunities. For more than a decade of experience, we’ve been practicing our profession in various industries and have expanded from our roots as a “job board” to multiple network provider of a full array of job seeking, career management, recruitment and talent management products and services.

At the heart of our success and our future with innovation: We are changing the way people think about career, hence we’re assisting job industries actively to improve every value and workforce performance evolvingly.
